test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: A document has one authoritative current version and immutable prior versions.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Generated documents record template version and input snapshot.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Signed versions are immutable.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Access follows workspace and linked-resource policy.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: File hashes detect corruption and duplicate content.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Retention and legal hold are evaluated before deletion.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: OCR text is labeled as extracted and retains confidence.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: External signatures are verified through provider evidence.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.
